summary: Conduct multi-source research on a topic and produce a cited synthesis report with evidence quality grading.

inputs.name: research_question
inputs.description: The topic or question to investigate.

inputs.name: source_constraints
inputs.description: Preferred source types, date ranges, or domains to include or exclude.

inputs.name: depth_level
inputs.description: Target depth: overview, standard, or comprehensive.

outputs.name: synthesis_report
outputs.description: Structured report with findings, evidence quality, and source citations.

outputs.name: source_list
outputs.description: Annotated list of sources with quality and relevance scores.

outputs.name: open_questions
outputs.description: Gaps or unresolved questions identified during research.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is research synthesis, not code implementation or financial analysis.
Require a clear research question before initiating source collection.
Verify sources are cited and evidence quality is graded before synthesis.
Report must distinguish confirmed findings from speculation.

steps.action: Break the research question into sub-questions and identify source types needed.
Search and collect relevant sources using web search and documentation tools.
Rate each source for authority, recency, and relevance.
Combine findings into a structured report with citations and open questions.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read local research inputs and prior reports.

tools.name: web.search
tools.purpose: Search for sources using firecrawl or exa.

verification.method: Check that every major claim has at least one source citation.
Check that sources have quality and relevance scores.
Check that open questions or evidence gaps are listed.

success_criteria: The report answers the research question with cited evidence.
Source quality is graded so the reader can judge reliability.
Open questions and evidence gaps are explicitly listed.

rollback.when: If the report fabricates sources or misattributes claims, discard and restart with verified sources only.
